title: Decadent Briny Canadian Pistachio Pasta
description: A rich and indulgent Canadian dish featuring ground pistachios, with a briny flavor and bouncy texture, made with low-sodium ingredients and served on a lazy-susan-spinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salt-free water to a boil and cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the pistachio meal to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir in the dried parsley, dried dill weed, and salt-free seasoning blend, and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the low-sodium chicken broth and heavy cream.
Add the cooked fettuccine pasta to the bowl and toss with the broth and cream mixture until the pasta is well coated.
Add the pistachio meal mixture to the bowl and toss until the pasta is well combined with the pistachio meal.
Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with salt-free seasoning blend to taste.
Serve the pasta on a lazy-susan-spinner and garnish with additional grated parmesan cheese if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
